description: Trigger accuracy queries for the prd-it skill. Tests that prd-it fires for product requirement definition and stays silent for planning, implementation, review, and architecture requests.

should_trigger.query: write a PRD for a team status summary feature
define the requirements for a new onboarding experience
capture the product spec for project invitations before design starts
what are we building for the customer portal MVP?
turn this feature brief into personas, stories, metrics, constraints, and non-goals
create product requirements for behavior changes to billing reminders

should_not_trigger.query: plan the implementation tasks for project invitations
implement the onboarding checklist from tasks/issues/001.md
review this PRD for missing architecture decisions
choose whether we should use Kafka or SQS
fix the typo in the product requirements doc
how does the current billing reminder flow work?
